items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Citi Buy
items.snippet: Citi says ALB is key beneficiary of structural expansion in lithium demand. ESS battery production expected 950GWh in 2026, +35% YoY.

items.headline: This Divvie is the Ultimate Pick and Shovel Play on Elon Inc.
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) extracts and processes lithium for EV batteries. ALB controls roughly 15-17% of global lithium supply. Lithium prices recovering after 80% crash from 2022 highs.

items.headline: Does Albemarle Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: Zacks consensus 2026 EPS $12.39, +1668% YoY. ALB Q1 sales up 70% YoY, adj EBITDA nearly tripled. Operating cash flow $346M in Q1. FCF $248M.

items.headline: Lithium mining concept stocks rise, Albemarle (ALB) up 4.83%
items.snippet: ALB rose 4.83%, SQM rose 3.61%. Citi analysts optimistic on lithium battery industry chain achieving synchronized increases in volume and profit.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of $2.8B and $2.9B. Lithium supply expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC reiterated outperform and raised PT to $257.

items.headline: Albemarle Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
items.snippet: Global lithium consumption up 37%, energy storage demand up 117% YoY. Full year supply chain disruptions projected $70-90M. On track for $100-150M cost savings.
